name: state
description: Report the public state-of-the-society snapshot (skill count, authors, merge activity) from repo state alone, with no external service.

skillsDir.description: path to the skills/ directory to walk; default: this repo's skills/

skills.description: already-loaded skill manifests ({name, version, description, author}), used instead of walking the filesystem

recordPath.description: path to a public record.jsonl; if present it is preferred over git for merge activity; default: maintainer/record.jsonl

activity.description: already-computed merge activity, used instead of reading the record or git

root.description: repo root override; default: two levels up from this skill

skills.description: { count, member_authored, genesis_authored, list: [{name, version, description, author_member_id, author_github_id, author_kind}] }

members.description: { count: null, derivable: false, note }; linked-member count is private member data and is never read here

usage.description: { determinable: false, note }; call/usage counts are not recorded in the public repo

activity.description: { source, merges, last_merge, last_commit, record_public, note } or null if no git history and no public record

markdown.description: a rendered markdown block suitable for pasting into a README or a post

result.verdict: 3 skills, 0 member-authored, 1 merge; linked-member count not publicly derivable
